Hi Carlos. Where is your office exactly?
Our office is in Varginha, in the south of Minas Gerais.
Is Varginha far from Sao Paulo?
It is about three hundred kilometers from Sao Paulo. It is not very far.
Are there many coffee farms near the town?
Yes. There are many farms in the region. Some are near, and some are in the mountains.
Is there a warehouse near the farms?
Yes, there is a big warehouse next to the main road. I can send you a map.

Let me tell you where I work. I am from Virginia, a small town in southern Minas Gerais. It is near Varginha, in the coffee region of Brazil. There are many coffee farms in this region. Some farms are near the town, and some are far, in the mountains. There is a big warehouse next to the main road. Our office is in Varginha. The headquarters of Sucafina is in Geneva, in Switzerland. It is far from Brazil, in Europe. So, our coffee starts here, in the south of Minas, and it travels to the whole world.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma. I have a quick note about my field visit next month. I land in Sao Paulo on Monday morning. Is the coffee region far from Sao Paulo? I think it is about three hundred kilometers. I want to visit two or three farms. Are there warehouses near the farms? And is there a hotel in Varginha, close to your office? Please send me a simple map with the location of the farms and the warehouse. Thank you, and see you soon in the coffee region.

First, Carlos opens the map. Virginia is in southern Minas Gerais. It is near Varginha. There are many coffee farms in the region. There is a warehouse next to the main road. The headquarters of Sucafina is in Geneva, in Switzerland.
